reason: Both answers converge on the same core recommendation (contractor bridge plus migrate to managed EKS/GKE, avoid a single replacement hire) and are similarly concise. Answer B better avoids recreating a bus factor by recommending platform ownership be spread across 2-3 existing engineers, while Answer A ends up suggesting hiring one platform engineer afterward, partially undercutting its own bus-factor point. Neither addresses service consolidation. B is slightly better aligned with the key points overall.
